title: LockLogin
description: A plugin that provides security to your Spigot/Bungee server, with some features like 2FA and other
body:
### Depends on [KarmaAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/karmaapi-platform.98542/)
LockLogin is [open source](https://github.com/KarmaDeb/LockLoginReborn)

![](https://i.imgur.com/T4vXmKe.png)
